checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present including customSections for severity_classification and deduplication_strategy

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows (Real-Time Alert, Weekly Report, Batched Digest) all have connected graphs with proper start/end nodes and decision branches

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Webhook has source+event_types. Two schedule triggers have valid cron expressions (0 9 * * 1, */30 * * * *)

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: sentry->error_monitoring, github->source_control, slack->chat_messaging all valid roles

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 5 adoption_questions added covering Sentry project, GitHub repo, Slack channels (alerts + digest), and critical threshold

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: All required connector fields marked. Sentry needs org_slug and project_slug. Slack has two channels (alerts + digest) with defaults.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity: 95 words. Instructions: ~1000 words with 7 steps. Tool guidance: detailed API endpoints with request/response examples. Examples: 3 scenarios. Error handling: per-service with rate limit awareness.

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical. Severity classification is transparent. No auto-deletion or destructive actions.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 95 words with clear purpose. Instructions 1000+ words covering 7 detailed workflow steps. Custom sections add severity classification rules and deduplication strategy. Tool guidance covers all 3 APIs with endpoints. 3 detailed examples. Comprehensive error handling.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: All 3 tools (http_request, file_read, file_write) documented with specific API calls per connector. Sentry, GitHub, Slack APIs all covered with method, endpoint, headers, and body format.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Three triggers perfectly match workflow: webhook for real-time alerts, weekly cron for Monday 9AM reports, 30-min cron for digest flush. All have descriptions aligned with prompt instructions.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: Every service in service_flow (Sentry, GitHub, Slack) has a full connector definition. Credential fields are comprehensive with helpful setup instructions.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Excellent memory design: known_issues.json for deduplication, error_digest_buffer.json for batching, weekly_report.json for trends. Agent memory tracks error patterns and team assignments.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Per-service failure strategy: Sentry retry with backoff, GitHub rate limit awareness, Slack local buffering. State file corruption recovery. Missing stack trace graceful handling. Duplicate detection on failure.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 use_case_flows perfectly match prompt: real-time alert processing, weekly report generation, batched digest delivery. Flow graphs include error handling nodes.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Clear value: eliminates alert fatigue, deduplicates errors, creates well-structured GitHub issues. Replaces 4 automation workflows. Each execution produces actionable output.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Sentry, GitHub, Slack APIs are standard and stable. Deduplication logic is well-specified. Minor: fingerprint-based deduplication with 80% stack frame similarity requires non-trivial LLM reasoning.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Strong differentiation: intelligent deduplication, root cause clustering, severity-based routing, weekly trend analysis. Goes well beyond what a webhook-to-Slack pipe could do.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: No template variables defined. Key user-specific values are in connector credential_fields and adoption_questions. Could benefit from configurable severity thresholds as variables.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Good defaults: #prod-alerts, #engineering-errors for Slack. Sentry org/project and GitHub repo require user input. Critical threshold default of 50 is sensible. Not fully zero-config but close.

issues: No adoption_questions — Sentry project, GitHub repo, Slack channels, and severity thresholds should be asked
Digest channel is optional in connector but prompt references it as required

template: Added 5 adoption_questions: sentry_project, github_repo_url, slack_alerts_channel, slack_digest_channel, critical_error_threshold
